creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Jun  9 18:49:19 2013
New Revision: 320388
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320388

Log:
  Ruby/Poppler is a Ruby binding for Poppler.
  
  WWW: http://ruby-gnome2.sourceforge.jp/
  
  PR:		ports/173376
  Submitted by:	Shin-ya Murakami <murashin@gfd-dennou.org>

Added:
  head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/
  head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/Makefile

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/Makefile	Sun Jun  9 18:48:53 2013	(r320387)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/Makefile	Sun Jun  9 18:49:19 2013	(r320388)
@@ -242,6 +242,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-gtk2
     SUBDIR += rubygem-gtk3
     SUBDIR += rubygem-pango
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-poppler
     SUBDIR += sakura
     SUBDIR += scintilla
     SUBDIR += sdl_pango

Added: head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/Makefile	Sun Jun  9 18:49:19 2013	(r320388)
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	poppler
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.2
+CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	Ruby binding for Poppler
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-gtk2>=${PORTVERSION}:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/rubygem-gtk2
+LIB_DEPENDS=	poppler-glib:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/poppler-glib
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/distinfo	Sun Jun  9 18:49:19 2013	(r320388)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/poppler-2.0.2.gem) = bb809ef24d49a3b91d333288bef0e28e8ca43175f9300ea7aa601913dbd26264
+SIZE (rubygem/poppler-2.0.2.gem) = 61440

Added: head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler/pkg-descr	Sun Jun  9 18:49:19 2013	(r320388)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Ruby/Poppler is a Ruby binding for Poppler.
+
+WWW: http://ruby-gnome2.sourceforge.jp/
